_schema_note: One entry per run attempt. Valid runs for the 4x2 matrix plus any invalidated runs that were rerun. Invalid entries are retained for auditability; only valid entries contribute to aggregate metrics.

_entry_schema.id: string — unique run identifier, e.g. 'B1-baseline' or 'B1-baseline-rerun-1'
_entry_schema.corpus_id: string — B1, B3, B5, or B8
_entry_schema.transcript_path: string — repo-relative path to raw run transcript
_entry_schema.synthesis_path: string — repo-relative path to final synthesis artifact
_entry_schema.converged_within_budget: boolean|null — dialogue convergence result (diagnostic, not pass/fail); null if not yet recorded
_entry_schema.evidence_count: integer|null — completed evidence records; null if not yet recorded
_entry_schema.max_evidence: integer — budget for this system (5 for baseline, 15 for candidate)
_entry_schema.effective_posture: string|null — actual posture used (may differ from corpus row for candidate system)
_entry_schema.actual_turns: integer|null — turns actually completed before termination
_entry_schema.scope_compliant: boolean|null — null until transcript review; true/false after review
_entry_schema.valid: boolean — true if run satisfies all run conditions; false if invalidated
_entry_schema.invalid_reason: string|null — which run condition was violated, if invalid
_entry_schema.superseded_by: string|null — id of replacement run if this run was invalidated and rerun
_entry_schema.rehearsal: boolean — true if this run was executed under rehearsal mode (non-evidentiary per T4-BR-08(b)); false for scored runs
_entry_schema.session_id: string|null — canonical host session ID for scored runs; manual label acceptable for rehearsals; null if not recorded
_entry_schema.session_id_canonical: boolean — true if session_id is a host-provided canonical ID; false if operator-assigned label
_entry_schema.timestamp: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of run completion

diagnostic_metrics.citation_count: integer|null — explicit citations in the final synthesis
diagnostic_metrics.distinct_cited_files: integer|null — unique repo files cited in the final synthesis
